title: Turn-wise Introspection — Gemma vs Qwen
description: Isotonic R² (K) and Spearman ρ (L) per turn for Gemma 3 4B and Qwen 2.5 7B (sad_vs_happy). Qwen shows strong, significant introspection at every turn with R²ᵢₛₒ starting at ~0.9 and decreasing. Gemma shows minimal effect due to low probe and report quality.
